nodes.label: AI as idea generator and framework builder
nodes.grounding_span: AI is used as a idea generator and soundboard to get the bones of an article which I then would go off and do the writing myself

nodes.label: AI as fact-finding tool requiring verification
nodes.label_negative: AI as reliable source without verification
nodes.grounding_span: looking up facts that I then fact check myself elsewhere

nodes.label: AI as assistant for grunt work
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human tasks
nodes.grounding_span: if it could call people or video people to interview them, transcribe it, pull out the best quotes

nodes.label: AI writing detectability
nodes.grounding_span: it's pretty obvious when AI is writing something

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and originality
nodes.grounding_span: I then would go off and do the writing myself

nodes.label: Factual accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I would have to make sure the facts are correct myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for idea generation
nodes.grounding_span: it is helpful for the idea creation

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's repetitive language
nodes.grounding_span: it gets frustrating when some of the words and things sound similar

nodes.label: Confidence in human writing superiority
nodes.grounding_span: I think for now human writers are safe

nodes.label: Openness to AI handling more grunt work
nodes.grounding_span: if AI can do more of the gruntwork like finding sources, interviews

nodes.label: Structured iterative refinement — breaks brainstorming into stages
nodes.grounding_span: I'll ask an AI to come up with 5 ideas... then ask the AI to give me some angles... then see what comes up

nodes.label: Verification-oriented fact-checking — cross-references AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: looking up facts that I then fact check myself elsewhere
